deployment_sequence.detail: Registered svg-outreach.workers.dev via Cloudflare API PUT /accounts/{id}/workers/subdomain

deployment_sequence.action: Update wrangler configs with namespace IDs

deployment_sequence.detail: Changed [services] inline format to [[services]] array format (wrangler v3/v4 requirement)
Marketing DB URL set on orchestrator and proxy-router via wrangler secret put
All 3 spoke workers deployed to svg-outreach.workers.dev
Orchestrator deployed with service bindings to all 3 spokes
Seeded linkedin.com::title parser config (regex-based) into PARSER_KV. Test URL already seeded by DB Agent (100 LinkedIn + 99 blog records).

7/7 gates PASS in 505ms. URL Validation (31ms) → Rate Check (130ms) → Fetch (146ms) → Parse (140ms) → Change Detection (9ms) → State Update (28ms) → Log (21ms). extracted_value=null (LinkedIn auth wall — expected for unauthenticated fetch).

issues_encountered.resolution: Registered via Cloudflare API PUT endpoint

issues_encountered.issue: orchestrator wrangler.toml service bindings syntax invalid
issues_encountered.resolution: Changed from [services] FETCHER = { service = '...' } to [[services]] binding/service array format

issues_encountered.issue: new Function() blocked by Cloudflare Workers runtime
issues_encountered.resolution: Refactored parser-registry to use regex-based ParserConfig JSON model instead of dynamic JS eval. KV values now store { type: 'regex', pattern, flags, group, transforms } instead of raw fn_body strings.
issues_encountered.impact: Gate 4 (Parse) failed on first smoke test attempt. Passed after refactor.

notes: DATABASE_URL currently set via wrangler secret put directly. Should be migrated to Doppler-based injection per user directive.
Scheduler remains dry_run=true — not activated until sample gate is cleared.
Parser refactor means all parser KV entries across the system need to use the new JSON config format (not raw fn_body).
